headline: DaVita (DVA) Stock Could Be 19% Overvalued Despite Strong Q1 Results
summary: DaVita stock has delivered a 126.1% return over the past three years, yet valuation checks send mixed signals, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) estimate pointing to a premium while market multiples suggest the shares may still be on the cheap side. DaVita's 126.1% three year return highlights how strongly the stock has rewarded investors who stayed invested over a multi year horizon. Expansion of DaVita's AI driven Integrated Kidney Care platform can support expectations for future cash...
